good.choose-date-easy: Click on the date within the date picker popup after opening it.
good.click-checkboxes-large: Use the 'Submit' button to check if a checkbox is already selected before clicking it again.
good.click-checkboxes-soft: Ensure you click on the checkbox labeled exactly as the task specifies, even if only partially matching terms are available.
good.click-collapsible-2: Ensure the section header is clicked to expand the section before clicking on the target link.
good.click-pie: Click on the '+' symbol in the center of the pie menu after focusing on the 'h' slice.
good.click-tab-2-hard: Ensure the target element is visible and interactable before clicking.
good.copy-paste: Click the 'Submit' button before copying the text.
good.count-shape: Click on the 'Count' button instead of the '9' button.
good.email-inbox: Ensure the trash icon is in view before clicking it.
good.enter-date: Use the ISO format 'YYYY-MM-DD' for the date input field.
good.enter-time: Enter the time in 24-hour format without the colon for AM/PM, e.g., '14:18' for '2:18 PM'.
good.find-word: Click the submit button after filling in the correct word.
good.grid-coordinate: Use the exact coordinate values instead of the bid.
good.guess-number: Adjust your guess based on the feedback received.
good.identify-shape: Click the button that corresponds to the type of the focused element, not the currently highlighted option.
good.login-user: Fill in the password field after entering the username.
good.multi-layouts: Click the search button after filling all required fields.
good.navigate-tree: Expand the parent folder before clicking on the target item.
good.read-table: Ensure you focus on the correct element before using the `fill` method.
good.search-engine: Click on the search results to view more details.
good.social-media: Click on the dropdown menu first before clicking the 'Embed Tweet' button.
good.tic-tac-toe: Select an empty cell to make your move.
good.use-autocomplete: Click the correct suggestion in the autocomplete menu before interacting with the submit button.
good.use-slider: Move the slider handle to the target position before clicking the submit button.
good.use-spinner: Click the submit button after setting the spinner to the desired value.
